column1: # SSSOM URI-level Mapping (D4D slot URIs ↔ RO-Crate property URIs)
# Generated from D4D LinkML schema slot_uri definitions
# Maps at the vocabulary/semantic level using:
# - D4D: slot_uri from LinkML schema (dcterms, dcat, schema, prov)
# - RO-Crate: JSON-LD property URIs (schema.org, EVI, RAI, D4D)
# d4d_module: D4D schema module containing this attribute
